Container.Name: lama-sidecar
Container.Overview: Full-resolution LaMa inpainting sidecar for CHUB's CL2K "retexting" feature. Exposes POST /api/v1/inpaint (the contract CHUB's lama_sidecar provider calls) and GET /health. CPU-only. On first run it downloads the big-lama model (~200MB, MD5+SHA256-verified) into /models and caches it there. The image runs as non-root (99:100 / nobody:users) by default. Expect roughly 1-2 GB RAM in use while inpainting. First start needs internet access for the model download. NO authentication by default — keep it on your LAN/Docker network only and do NOT expose it to the internet; set the optional LAMA_API_KEY variable to require an X-API-Key header on /api/v1/* requests.

Config.Name: Model cache
Config.Description: Persists the downloaded big-lama model so it isn't re-fetched on restart

Config.Name: Region target res
Config.Description: Cap on the per-region crop long-edge fed to the model. Thin holes (title text) stay at native resolution up to this cap; bulky holes and very wide bands are downscaled so they recover texture instead of blurring — and so a huge band doesn't run full-size for no visible gain. Set 0 to run one whole-frame pass.

Config.Name: Region padding
Config.Description: Context padding around each masked region as a fraction of its size. Larger values give the inpainter more surrounding context and merge nearby text into one region.

Config.Name: Mask dilate (px)
Config.Description: Grow the incoming mask by this many pixels before inpainting so a logo's anti-aliased fringe and soft glow get erased too (otherwise they survive as a faint ghost outline). Raise to 7-8 for beveled/metallic/glowing logos, lower to 2-3 if your masks are already generous. 0 disables.

Config.Name: Mask feather (px)
Config.Description: Gaussian-soften the composite seam by this many pixels so the filled region blends into the surroundings. 0 = hard edge.

Config.Name: API key
Config.Description: Optional API key. When set, all /api/v1/* requests must send it in the X-API-Key header; /health stays open. Empty disables auth — LAN/Docker-network use only.

Config.Name: Model SHA256
Config.Description: Expected SHA256 of the big-lama model, verified alongside the MD5 on download and at every start; a corrupted cached model is re-downloaded once. Set empty to skip the SHA256 check.

Config.Name: Region min pad (px)
Config.Description: Minimum context padding in pixels around each masked region, whatever its size, so small regions still get enough surrounding context to inpaint from.

Config.Name: Max concurrency
Config.Description: Cap on inpaint requests processed in parallel. Each concurrent request adds roughly 1-2 GB RAM and saturates CPU cores; keep at 1 unless the box has headroom.
